## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and localization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site migration project ongoing; some roadblocks encountered but progress made on redirects](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Blog content performance showing upward trajectory since April, with social-specific posts performing well](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [LLM mentions tracking to be implemented to optimize for AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Localization strategy is a priority, with plans to expand to 5 locales; next focus on Traditional Chinese](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

## Topics

### Site Migration Update

  - Global redirect from non-www to [www.firework.com](http://www.firework.com) implemented
  - [Some broken links encountered; plan to proceed with migration and fix issues case-by-case](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Jenn offered to run Screaming Frog scan to quickly identify 404s](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Content Performance

  - [45 pieces published in July (extra week in month)](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Overall site impressions down week-over-week, but clicks up by 187](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Blog content showing steady upward trajectory since mid-May](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Top performing posts include social-specific content (TikTok, Instagram) and vertical video topics](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### LLM Mentions and Traffic

  - [Megan to start tracking Firework mentions in LLMs using 100 carefully selected prompts](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [3% of website traffic identified as coming from LLM referrals (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Statistics-based content performing well in LLM citations; strategy to focus more on such content](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Analytics Issues

  - [Unexplained "not set" entries appearing in analytics, possibly due to nested redirects or canonical issues](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [High session counts for these entries warrant investigation](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Localization Strategy

  - [Currently have Spanish, French, and Japanese locales](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Aiming to expand to 5 locales as per Webflow contract](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Next priority: Traditional Chinese, followed by German](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Cameron to focus on translating top 20 blog posts for existing locales](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cameron to proceed with site migration, addressing broken links as they arise](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Jenn to investigate "not set" analytics issue and perform Screaming Frog scan](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Megan to implement LLM mention tracking and present findings next week](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Cameron to prioritize blog post translations for existing locales post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Team to have more regular discussions on localization strategy and performance](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Jenn to publish content only to English locale for now, awaiting further localization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/9zY71bq84SmKtWHPWQPyrcixee-QZtGM?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
